description: Composition Pink top made of 100% cotton with a falling neck, three-fourth sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash Care Machine wash or hand wash separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring dry Dry in shade Medium iron, but do not iron on print Don the boho chic look in a really cool way with this trendy pink top from jealous 21.
